MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 05, 2008:
Brenda Cruz Keith, attorney for plaintiff Alberta Tolliver, who is also present; Paul Tokeshi and James Bryant, attorneys for defendant Augusta Brown, who is also present (and Margaree Young, who is not present)

Settlement conference is held. Case is settled. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1071 Hollister Street, San Francisco, California.
June 23, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
